message:
test(pager): add page cache efficiency monitoring test infrastructure (bd-t6sv2.8)

New test helpers and tests for structured page cache diagnostics:

- emit_cache_monitor_log(): structured JSON logging for cache metrics
  snapshots, emitting bead_id, workload_type, hit/miss rates, ARC
  partition sizes (T1/T2/B1/B2/p_target), dirty ratio, and MVCC
  multi-version page counts
- populate_monitored_page() / touch_monitored_page(): helpers for
  deterministic page population in monitoring tests
- New tests covering sequential scan, hot-set, mixed read/write, and
  zipfian access pattern workloads with structured metric capture
- HashMap import added for per-page access tracking in zipfian tests
- Removed unreachable dead-code guard in pager checkpoint (cleanup
  from prior commit 0804678b)

Part of bd-t6sv2.8 (Page Cache Efficiency Monitor) verification track.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
